morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 9" over the last week. The terrain list grew by 4 today. More variety to choose from. Windy conditions expected. Upper lifts may have holds or delays.

morningBrief.body: The mountain got a nice 3.9" boost overnight. Conditions are improved. The elevation will make all the difference today. Rain down low, snow up high.
